ModMetaData.name: Linux IME Fix Linux 输入法修复
ModMetaData.author: RunningBugs
ModMetaData.description:
[h1] Linux IME Fix Linux 输入法修复 [/h1]
Enables Unity IME composition for RimWorld's legacy IMGUI text fields on Linux.
This is intended for Linux desktop players using IBus/Rime/Fcitx-style input methods where pasting Chinese works but direct IME input does not.
[h2] What it does [/h2] - Detects active IMGUI TextField/TextArea controls. - Forces Unity's IME composition mode on while a text field is focused. - Updates Unity's composition cursor position so the input method has a target location. - Suppresses RimWorld's global Accept action while an IME composition string is active.
[h2] 中文说明 [/h2] 用于修复 Linux 下 RimWorld 旧 IMGUI 文本框无法直接使用系统输入法的问题。适用于“粘贴中文可以，但直接输入法输入不行”的情况。
